requests.name: GET /base64/{value}
requests.summary: Decodes base64url-encoded string.

requests.name: GET /basic-auth/{user}/{passwd}
requests.summary: Prompts the user for authorization using HTTP Basic Auth.

requests.name: GET /bearer
requests.summary: Prompts the user for authorization using bearer authentication.

requests.name: GET /brotli
requests.summary: Returns Brotli-encoded data.

requests.name: GET /bytes/{n}
requests.summary: Returns n random bytes generated with given seed

requests.name: GET /cache
requests.summary: Returns a 304 if an If-Modified-Since header or If-None-Match is present. Returns the same as a GET otherwise.

requests.name: GET /cache/{value}
requests.summary: Sets a Cache-Control header for n seconds.

requests.name: GET /cookies
requests.summary: Returns cookie data.

requests.name: GET /cookies/delete
requests.summary: Deletes cookie(s) as provided by the query string and redirects to cookie list.

requests.name: GET /cookies/set
requests.summary: Sets cookie(s) as provided by the query string and redirects to cookie list.

requests.name: GET /cookies/set/{name}/{value}
requests.summary: Sets a cookie and redirects to cookie list.

requests.name: GET /deflate
requests.summary: Returns Deflate-encoded data.

requests.name: DELETE /delay/{delay}
requests.summary: Returns a delayed response (max of 10 seconds).

requests.name: GET /delay/{delay}
requests.summary: Returns a delayed response (max of 10 seconds).

requests.name: PATCH /delay/{delay}
requests.summary: Returns a delayed response (max of 10 seconds).

requests.name: POST /delay/{delay}
requests.summary: Returns a delayed response (max of 10 seconds).

requests.name: PUT /delay/{delay}
requests.summary: Returns a delayed response (max of 10 seconds).

requests.name: DELETE /delete
requests.summary: The request's DELETE parameters.

requests.name: GET /deny
requests.summary: Returns page denied by robots.txt rules.

requests.name: GET /digest-auth/{qop}/{user}/{passwd}
requests.summary: Prompts the user for authorization using Digest Auth.

requests.name: GET /digest-auth/{qop}/{user}/{passwd}/{algorithm}
requests.summary: Prompts the user for authorization using Digest Auth + Algorithm.

requests.name: GET /digest-auth/{qop}/{user}/{passwd}/{algorithm}/{stale_after}
requests.summary: Prompts the user for authorization using Digest Auth + Algorithm.

requests.name: GET /drip
requests.summary: Drips data over a duration after an optional initial delay.

requests.name: GET /encoding/utf8
requests.summary: Returns a UTF-8 encoded body.

requests.name: GET /etag/{etag}
requests.summary: Assumes the resource has the given etag and responds to If-None-Match and If-Match headers appropriately.

requests.name: GET /get
requests.summary: The request's query parameters.

requests.name: GET /gzip
requests.summary: Returns GZip-encoded data.

requests.name: GET /headers
requests.summary: Return the incoming request's HTTP headers.

requests.name: GET /hidden-basic-auth/{user}/{passwd}
requests.summary: Prompts the user for authorization using HTTP Basic Auth.

requests.name: GET /html

requests.name: GET /json
